rationale.R1.2: The paragraph opens with 'human-level play across all 12 Atari games' but then sequentially excludes four of the twelve (Montezuma's Revenge, Asterix, Bowling, Atlantis), each for post-hoc reasons. Whether the headline claim is internally consistent with the body of the paragraph is a central logical-consistency question regardless of delegation intent.
rationale.R1.3: The headline claim 'human-level' is applied to a score band of 85–95% (redefined as human-level 'given noise') and to a subset from which hard and unstable games were removed after evaluation. Assessing whether the evidence as presented actually supports the claim is materially in scope.

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want a check of logical consistency and claim accuracy—i.e., whether 'human-level across all 12 games' is supported by the scores and exclusions described—or are you looking for writing-quality feedback on style, clarity, and flow?
